privileged_info_summary: The task configures Jitsi Meet running at http://localhost:8080 to enforce identity validation by enabling the prejoinPageEnabled and requireDisplayName configuration options in /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js. The test uses a synthetic meeting room named 'PolicyTestRoom'. Evidence screenshots are saved to /home/ga/Documents/evidence_blocked.png and /home/ga/Documents/evidence_success.png to demonstrate the enforced validation behavior.
